perTest.details: test_t_3_1_session_reuse_and_custom_headers PASSED in 1.47s. Both client.users.get_user calls (plain + custom_headers via client.get) returned AlmaResponse.success=True against SANDBOX user <user_primary_id>. _request chokepoint + per-call headers verified live.

test_t_4_1_consolidated_request_path PASSED in 0.63s. Single client.users.get_user call returned AlmaResponse with success=True and non-empty .data dict. Consolidated _request() + _safe_response_body() verified against live Alma response.

perIssue.note: AC-1 (private _session attribute) and AC-3 (test_public_api_contract.py) are in unmappable[] — internal/test-suite assertions cannot be SANDBOX-verified. Should be tested:passing-needs-review per spec §8.
